votes.rationale: Motion-0046 replaces the 30-slot all-OpenAI placeholder with a corrected Phase 1 staffing manifest: 10 live dual-provider executor slots, 5 honestly deferred selectors, and 3 explicit voting role assignments. The manifest is well-formed, right-sized, and ready to serve as the canonical staffing input for governed multi-provider council operations.

The motion stays tightly scoped to staffing corrections without overreaching into panel mechanics, voting config, or selector activation. Risks around reduced slot redundancy and Proposer/Arbiter provider overlap are acknowledged and appropriately mitigated by Phase 1 labeling and cross-provider Challenger independence. The parallel-file approach avoids breaking existing tooling.

The corrected manifest is structurally sound, practically deployable, and governs a real staffing decision that was previously implicit. Selector deferral is the right call given the absence of an evaluation harness. The follow-up reconciliation with model-slots.yaml and model-routing.yaml is noted and expected.
